name: Red & Green Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicory into thin rings.
2. Divide the endive leaves and arrange them in a salad bowl.
3. Cut the fennel into quarters, then slice each quarter thinly.
4. Mix the fennel and chicory and arrange on top of the endive leaves.
5. Tear the radicchio into small pieces and place in the bowl.
6. Slice the radishes thinly and sprinkle over the salad.
7. In a separate container, mix together the olive oil and red wine vinegar.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Pour the dressing mixture over the salad.
10. Toss everything well and serve immediately.
